_source_of_truth_note: Canonical item-class spec for Wasteland Crystals. Per the boss's 2026-05-07 design framing: 'there should be a variable inventory of items in the trash that can break down. you will probably want a system to track what garbage is where before it breaks down.' This file defines the discrete things that exist in a cell — appliances, batteries, drywall sheets, etc. — each tagged with the substrate tokens it contributes to the chemistry. Per-scenario item counts live in scenarios.json items_in_cell; cell-population (js/07-cell-population.ts) procedurally places each item with a deterministic seed. Project memory project_wasteland_crystals records the design principle: 'rigid hollow items (appliances) are LITERAL VUGS' — coarse_rigid_void items render as hollow rectangles in the schematic to make this explicit.

_schema.display_name: Display name for narrators and UI.
_schema.substrate_tokens: Array of substrate tokens this item type contributes (matching minerals.json substrate_grows_on and scenarios.json substrate_inventory tokens). A refrigerator contains galvanized_steel + copper_wiring + plastic_housing — placing one fridge in a cell adds all three substrates locally.
_schema.size_class: Renderer-relevant size: coarse_rigid_void (appliances, car bodies, tires — large rigid items that don't compact and create literal vugs in the strict mineralogical sense) | medium (batteries, drywall sheets, concrete chunks — smaller objects, can be displaced by compaction but not crushed) | fines (organic matrix, food waste, paper — fluffy material, fills voids between rigid items, rendered only as background).
_schema.rigid: Boolean. true → item resists compaction and creates an internal void on burial. false → item compacts into the cell's matrix.
_schema.typical_dim_m: [width_m, height_m] for 2D rendering. Reflects the item's apparent size in cross-section.
_schema.typical_mass_kg: Approximate single-item mass. Used for future settling-physics; not yet wired in.
_schema.decay_phase_window: Leachate phases during which this item type significantly decays. Used by the future decay model (not yet implemented in v7); kept here for forward compatibility.
_schema.decay_timescale_yr: Approximate full-decay timescale in years. Used by the future decay model; informational for now.
_schema.description: 1-2 sentences in clinical-Borges register. Treated as data for the surveyor's notebook — the future-miner's reference for what each item means chemically.

_audit_summary._notes: v0.1.0 item spine. Six coarse-rigid (the literal-vug items: refrigerator, washing_machine, car_body, water_heater, tv_cabinet, tire), six medium (lead_acid_battery, drywall_sheet, concrete_chunk, pvc_pipe_section, copper_wire_bundle, rebar_bundle), one matrix-fines (organic_matrix). Substrate-token coverage spans all the tokens in minerals.json substrate_grows_on plus scenarios.json substrate_inventory. NOT YET COVERED: hazardous-waste items (fluorescent tubes, paint cans), e-waste detail (PCB scrap as separate class), incinerator residues (MSWI bottom ash, fly ash). Slated for future scenarios.

refrigerator.description: Rigid appliance shell with galvanized inner liner, copper compressor coils, and plastic housing. Refrigerant lines (CFC or HCFC depending on era) leak out within decades; the steel shell rusts; the interior remains hollow as a literal vug for crystal nucleation on the inner surfaces.

washing_machine.description: Rigid steel drum and chassis with copper motor windings and a cast-iron weight block. The drum's internal void survives burial; copper from the motor delivers Cu²⁺ to the local chemistry once the casing rusts through.

car_body.description: End-of-life vehicle body; the largest single coarse-rigid void in any cell that hosts one. Galvanized panels, copper wiring harness, residual lead-acid battery if not removed at scrap intake. Lifts compact around the body; the engine compartment and cabin remain as vug-grade interior voids for centuries.

water_heater.description: Cylindrical galvanized steel tank with sacrificial-anode magnesium rod and copper inlet/outlet fittings. Tank internal volume preserved as void post-burial; the magnesium anode delivers Mg²⁺ to local chemistry.

tv_cabinet.description: Cathode-ray-tube or early flat-panel television in plastic-or-wood housing. PCB scrap inside delivers diffuse lead-solder and copper-wiring substrates; the leaded glass of CRT screens contributes Pb²⁺ to acidic pore water.

tire.description: End-of-life tire with steel-belt reinforcement. Rubber matrix is highly stable under landfill conditions but pyrolyzes if the cell hosts a tire-pile fire — the resulting char is the documented source of the ZnS-rich precursor that delivers sphalerite under burn-zone chemistry.

lead_acid_battery.description: Vehicle starter battery; the diagnostic Pb anchor in any MSW cell. Polypropylene casing splits within ~5–15 years of burial, releasing the H2SO4 electrolyte and exposing the Pb plates to leachate. Garcia Lopez observed these as metallic Pb relics in the Mont-Saint-Guibert <4.5 mm fines fraction.

drywall_sheet.description: Construction-and-demolition gypsum board fragment. Dissolves slowly under leachate flow, delivering the SO4 the cell's sulfate-reducer chemistry runs on; the dominant sulfate source once battery acid is exhausted.

concrete_chunk.description: C&D rubble fragment with embedded rebar. Cement matrix dissolves slowly under acidogenic VFAs; the embedded rebar delivers Fe²⁺ to local chemistry once exposed. The dominant Ca and HCO3 source for late-stage carbonate paragenesis.

pvc_pipe_section.description: Plumbing or drainage pipe section. PVC degrades slowly over centuries — HCl release becomes detectable around 40 yrs and continues; the chloride source that underwrites pyromorphite's Pb5(PO4)3Cl composition and goslarite's Zn-Cl coupling.

copper_wire_bundle.description: Stripped electrical cable, motor windings, or PCB scrap with exposed copper. Bare Cu corrodes under acidic leachate; insulated wire delays attack until the insulation degrades. The Cu²⁺ source for malachite, atacamite, and the broader copper-supergene suite at the wall flank.

rebar_bundle.description: Steel reinforcement bar from the C&D fraction. Anaerobic corrosion under the methanogenic phase delivers Fe²⁺ at sustained rate; vivianite and pyrite recipients of this iron source.

organic_matrix.description: Aggregated food waste, paper, yard trimmings, and biological tissue — the bulk matrix between rigid items. Not rendered as discrete objects; treated as a background presence that supplies PO4, NH4, organic VFAs, and the reducing potential running the methanogenic phase. Counts in scenarios.json items_in_cell are abstract 'mass units' rather than item counts.
